stream_samples.text: linear graphql endpoint p95 has been 4.2s for our 38k-issue workspace for two weeks. issues.list with filter is the worst.
Reassigning a sub-issue's parent across cycles wipes the estimate and assignee. Lost 30 min of context in a triage today.
[#7402 P1] Cycle automation moving completed sub-issues back to Backlog when the parent rolls over a cycle boundary
Search relevance regressed hard last week — typing the issue title verbatim returns it 4th, behind unrelated archived ones.
GraphQL pagination with first:250 and a label filter on a big workspace times out at 30s. Used to be fine in January.
Mobile widget loading state stuck at "Syncing" indefinitely on iOS 18.2 after backgrounding the app for >10min
Sub-issue cascade rule for "close parent when all children done" misfires when a child is canceled (not completed)
linear's API rate limits are way too aggressive for backfill scripts now. 429ing on 800 req/min, docs still say 1500.
[ENG-4180] graphql resolver N+1 on issue.children when filter includes labels — confirmed via APM trace
is the keyboard shortcut for "move to project" different on the new release? muscle memory broken
Initiative roll-up progress bar shows 0% for initiatives with archived projects, even when active projects are 80% done
the new Linear async standup view is exactly what I wanted. finally killed our daily sync.
Slack notification for issue mention is firing 3-4 times per mention since the v2025.4.2 release. devs are turning notifications off.
support-eng triage: 11 P1s this week tagged graphql-perf, all from workspaces >25k issues

clusters.title: GraphQL p95 latency on large workspaces
Mobile widget sync stalls after background

top_epic.title: Cut GraphQL p95 to under 800ms on workspaces with 25k+ issues
top_epic.rationale: 1,860 signals from X, HN, Slack Connect and internal Linear telemetry trace the same root cause: an N+1 in the issue.children resolver when label filters are present is dragging p95 to 4.2s on Linear's largest customer cohort. Eleven P1s in seven days — every one from a workspace north of 25k issues. This is the cohort with the highest expansion ARR per seat.
top_epic.verdict: Platform-critical — query latency is the single biggest churn signal for enterprise.
top_epic.recommendation: Land the resolver dataloader fix, add per-resolver SLOs to CI, and roll out a workspace-size perf gate before any new filter ships.
acceptance_criteria: issue.children resolver p95 < 250ms on workspaces with 25k+ issues
GraphQL endpoint p95 overall < 800ms across the top-100 enterprise workspaces
Per-resolver latency SLO published and tracked in the engineering dashboard
CI perf gate fails any resolver PR that regresses p95 by more than 10%
